The dock that helps you do more.

Charged and ready.
Room-filling sound.
The Charging Speaker Dock keeps the Pixel Tablet powered 24/7 – so it’s ready when you are.

Performance and entertainment

Incredibly fast. Uniquely entertaining.

Performance and entertainment

Incredibly fast. Uniquely entertaining.

The power and speed of Google Tensor G2.

The Pixel Tablet is the first tablet with the Tensor G2 chip built in. It features Google AI, fast and smooth streaming, high-quality video calls, accurate voice typing, multitasking with split-screen, and more.
Learn more

The power and speed of Google Tensor G2.

The Pixel Tablet is the first tablet with the Tensor G2 chip built in. It features Google AI, fast and smooth streaming, high-quality video calls, accurate voice typing, multitasking with split-screen, and more.
Learn more

The power and speed of Google Tensor G2.

The Pixel Tablet is the first tablet with the Tensor G2 chip built in. It features Google AI, fast and smooth streaming, high-quality video calls, accurate voice typing, multitasking with split-screen, and more.
Learn more

The power and speed of Google Tensor G2.

The Pixel Tablet is the first tablet with the Tensor G2 chip built in. It features Google AI, fast and smooth streaming, high-quality video calls, accurate voice typing, multitasking with split-screen, and more.
Learn more

By Google for Pixel

Tensor G2. The chip behind it all.

Relighting and auto-framing for Google Meet video calls.

Enabled by Tensor G2, the camera is able to follow your movement around the room to keep you in frame. And automatic lighting adjustments keep you brightly lit so you always look your best.

Super intelligent dictation.

Tensor G2 runs Google’s latest advanced speech recognition. Your Pixel understands how you speak and learns names of your family and friends, favorite places, and more. And it gets even better over time.

Amazing
gaming.

Tensor G2's GPU delivers smooth real-time rendering for stunning, fluid graphics.

Fast performance.

Tensor G2 features Google AI, fast and smooth streaming, high-quality video calls, accurate voice typing, efficient multitasking, and more.

Boosts battery life.

Every aspect of Tensor G2 was designed to improve your Pixel Tablet's performance and efficiency for great battery life. Tensor G2 runs Google’s machine learning models with less power and latency. And it makes the Pixel Tablet faster and more helpful than ever.

Secure to the core.

With Google Tensor G2 and the certified Titan M2 security chip, the Pixel Tablet shares the same hardware security as the highly rated Pixel phones.

Gemini built in, for more AI-mazing.

Gemini built in, for more AI-mazing.

One ask, done across your apps.

Save time by asking Gemini to find information and get things done for you across your Google apps – like Gmail, Maps, YouTube Music, and Drive. It’s multitasking made easy.
Explore

You imagine it. Gemini creates it.

Generate an image with Gemini just by typing in your idea. Dream big, then easily drop it into Google Messages or Gmail to share.
Explore

See it. Circle it. Whoa.

Just circle an image or text, even in a video. Pixel and AI find it fast – right from the app you’re in.
Explore
The only tablet with Chromecast built in.
The only tablet with Chromecast built in.
The Pixel Tablet is the first tablet that comes with Chromecast. So you can cast music and videos from your phone to your docked tablet with just a few steps.
Find your favorites with Google TV.
Find your favorites with Google TV.
The Pixel Tablet comes with the Google TV widget already loaded, so you can browse personalized recommendations or watch the shows and movies you love from your favorite apps. All right on the home screen.
Enjoy apps, games, and more with Google Play.
Enjoy apps, games, and more with Google Play.
The Pixel Tablet lets you access the same apps you use on other Pixel devices. Plus, find and enjoy more apps, games, and books on Google Play.
Reimagine your photos, right on your tablet.
Reimagine your photos, right on your tablet.
Magic Editor in Google Photos makes complex edits easy. With a few taps, AI can change the background, move objects, and more.
Pixel portfolio

Pixel portfolio

It works with Pixel devices. And other devices, too.

Browse the Pixel portfolio

A simpler way to share.

With Quick Share, you can simply and securely share photos, videos, contacts, links, and more between your Pixel Tablet and other nearby phones and laptops.

Fix photos from other devices.

Easily remove distractions in the background of your pictures with Magic Eraser in Google Photos. Or change the color and brightness so an object blends right in.
Home controls

The tablet that takes care of home.

Get faster access to your controls.
Get faster access to your controls.
Whether your tablet is docked or in your hands, your go-to controls are now easier to access. Skip the unlock and just swipe on your tablet to access lock screen widgets for smart home controls, playing music, and more.
Quick and easy smart home controls.
Quick and easy smart home controls.
The Pixel Tablet gives you quick access to smart home controls with the home panel. It’s an easy way to view, control, and make adjustments to the devices in your home.
Manage your home more easily with the redesigned Google Home app.
Manage your home more easily with the redesigned Google Home app.
Google Home is now more personalized and helpful. Scan your camera footage faster, create device-specific Favorites and automations easily, and enjoy more home controls in Google Home for web.
Just say “Hey Google” for hands-free help at home.
Just say “Hey Google” for hands-free help at home.
Google Assistant is standing by to give you hands-free help. Just say things like “Hey Google, turn on the lights” or “Hey Google, set the temperature to 70 degrees.”

The do-it-all case that lets you do more.

The Pixel Tablet Case protects from scratches and drops. It has a built-in polished metal ring stand for viewing at almost any angle. And you can dock your tablet without having to remove the case.

Frequently asked questions.

Does the Charging Speaker Dock come with the Pixel Tablet?

You can purchase the Pixel Tablet and Charging Speaker Dock as a bundle. The Pixel Tablet and Charging Speaker Dock can also be purchased separately.

Can I control my Nest devices with the Pixel Tablet?

Yes, in addition to controlling your Nest devices and other compatible smart home devices with the Google Home app, you can also control your home with the Pixel Tablet’s home control panel.

What is Quick Share and what devices can it work with?

Quick Share allows you to quickly and securely share photos, videos, contacts, links, and more between your Pixel Tablet and nearby Android phones and laptops.

Can the Pixel Tablet charge with a regular USB-C® cord?

Yes, in addition to charging your Pixel Tablet with the Charging Speaker Dock, you will also be able to charge your Pixel Tablet with a USB-C® cord.

Does the Pixel Tablet have a cellular plan option?

No, the Pixel Tablet is only available with Wi-Fi connectivity.

Can the Charging Speaker Dock pair with any Bluetooth audio device?

No, the Charging Speaker Dock only works with the Pixel Tablet when it’s docked.

Can multiple speaker docks pair together to provide surround sound?

No, Charging Speaker Docks do not connect to each other to create one unified output of sound. Charging Speaker Docks only extend the sound of the tablet when it’s docked.

Will the Pixel Tablet Case obstruct the docking and charging experience?

No, the Pixel Tablet Case is designed to work seamlessly with the tablet and Charging Speaker Dock.
